description_long: This object is a decorative flower arrangement set in a white vase with gold veining. The flowers have vibrant red petals, each rendered on flat, rectangular planes that are layered and angled to create a sense of fullness and depth. The petals are grouped in clusters, giving the impression of multiple blooms emerging from the vase. Green leaves, also depicted on flat planes, are interspersed among the flowers, adding contrast and realism. The vase itself is rounded and smooth, with a glossy finish and a marbled pattern. The overall appearance is stylized, with a focus on bold color and geometric representation rather than botanical accuracy.
description: A stylized red flower arrangement with green leaves in a white, marbled vase. The petals and leaves are depicted on flat planes, creating a layered, geometric look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dense cluster of red petals and green leaves emerging from the marbled vase.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical spread of the flowers and the gold veining on the vase.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the overlapping petals and the base of the vase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the angled arrangement of petals and the distribution of leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled and overlapping configuration, with multiple layers radiating outward from the central stems. The arrangement lacks strict radial symmetry but creates a full, clustered appearance typical of ornamental bouquets.
